rows.label: tlk70000008_01_msg0001
rows.name:
Our squad guards the palace.
But the troops get worse each
year. Bleedin' shame.

rows.label: tlk70000008_01_msg0002
rows.name:
Problem is, the palace hasn't needed
defending in so long. No invasion gets
far enough to actually threaten it.

rows.label: tlk70000008_01_msg0003
rows.name:
Which is great, but our squad's short
on real fighters lately. Everyone
gets this job cos of connections.

rows.label: tlk70000008_01_msg0004
rows.name:
More and more just skive off,
act charming, and forget what
soldiers are meant to be.

rows.label: tlk70000008_01_msg0005
rows.name:
It's dire. In a real attack, we're
in for a battering. This lot of
arseholes won't know what hit 'em.

rows.label: tlk70000008_01_msg0006
rows.name:
It'd serve 'em right, too! Gwahahahah!
I wish I could replace the lot, but
talent doesn't grow on trees, y'know!
